notes: Forced to use Proton 3.16-8, otherwise the game downloads a dysfunctional Linux version (not advertised on Steam). Windows version works through Proton perfectly and with good performance,  both in Windowed and in fullscreen and with good performance. Nintendo Switch Pro Controller works too.
title: GNOG
